title: Layers
description: Modeled coastal flood hazard zone for 100-year storm plus sea-level rise.
abstract:
Coastal flood hazard zones were developed by 3 different external expert consultants in 2020. The layers are derived by advanced models using empirical calculations including tide gauge and extreme water level analysis, wind records and wave models, and used the 2019 LiDAR DEM.

Three different models were used to construct the coastal flood layers: a full-coastline ‘bathtub model’ (Tonkin and Taylor, 2020), and two hydrodynamic models for Rangaunu (eCoast, 2020) and Kaipara (DHI, 2019) harbors. The reports detailing the methodologies can be accessed from the NRC website.

layers.name: Coastal Flood Hazard Zone 3 (100 years + Rapid SLR Scenario)
layers.title: Coastal Flood Hazard Zone 3 (100 years + Rapid SLR Scenario)
